reasoning: AICO (Autoridades Indígenas de Colombia) is a minor political party representing indigenous communities. They typically compete in the special indigenous constituency, which only allocates 2 seats in the 108-seat Colombian Senate. Major political parties and sweeping coalitions like the Pacto Histórico, Partido Liberal, Partido Conservador, and Centro Democrático routinely win between 10 and 20 seats each in the 100-seat national constituency. It is practically impossible for a small niche party like AICO to out-seat the traditional and major national parties to win the most seats overall in the 2026 election. The Polymarket estimate of 0.01 strongly correlates with this near-zero probability. I am bounding my estimate at the minimum allowed limit.
